title: Skill India Mission Partners Digital Technologies is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
company: Skill India Mission Partners Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Skill India Mission Partners Digital Technologies is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Skill India Mission Partners Digital Technologies family as a Subject Matter Expert in Pune. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Skill India Mission Partners Digital Technologies:
Skill India Mission Partners Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Skill India Mission Partners Digital Technologies!
